title: AI Module 5 Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of Continuous Internal Evaluation for an Artificial Intelligence module, showing how various assessment components feed into learning and final outcomes.
relationships: Formative and Summative assessments provide data for Instructor Analysis
Instructor Analysis combines with Student Feedback to calculate Learning Outcomes & Grades
The results create a Feedback Loop that informs and improves future teaching strategies and student learning
